artPrompt: A derelict water-treatment plant rises in the wide frame: rusted pipes and a cracked concrete clarifier tank brimming with bubbling green sludge, mutant vines strangling the catwalks, drifting litter caught in the murk under a bruised stormy sky. No figure, only decay. A single sickly bioluminescent glow festers in the tank below, one cold storm-light from above, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Abandoned Water Treatment Plant
text:
Abandoned Water Treatment Plant enters the battlefield tapped unless you control a creature with a sludge counter on it.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.
{2}, {T}: Put a sludge counter on target creature you control. The machinery still runs. Nobody's signed off on shutting it down because nobody's gone back inside.
flavorText: Condemned in '91. The condemnation notice is also condemned now.
